channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in C++ (Monthly)

item.description:
👤 Owner: 0xdeadbeefnetwork

📝 Repository: 0xdeadbeefnetwork/ssh-keysign-pwn

item.description:
👤 Owner: AmmarkoV

📝 Repository: AmmarkoV/SAM3DBody-cpp

💻 Linguaggio: C

item.title: 📝 aimardcr/akane-injector (109 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: aimardcr

📝 Repository: aimardcr/akane-injector

📄 Descrizione: A kernel-assisted shared-library injector for Android. Loads any .so into a target process without ptrace, in-process dlopen, or visible traces in /proc/<pid>/maps. GKI 2.0 (Android 12-16).

⭐ Stelle: 109

🍴 Forks: 30

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: android anti-detection arm64 frida gki injection kernel-module ptrace-free

item.title: 📝 X-3306/Project-Onyx (101 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: X-3306

📝 Repository: X-3306/Project-Onyx

📄 Descrizione: Advanced EDR Evasion via AI Telemetry Spoofing & WASM Sandboxing. Project Onyx is a PoC Red Team pipeline designed to demonstrate advanced evasion techniques against modern EDR systems. It shifts away from traditional signature-based obfuscation towards behavioral camouflage and strict environmental keying.

⭐ Stelle: 101

🍴 Forks: 13

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: ai av-bypass chain cpp cryptography edr-evasion in-memory-execution malware-development monolithic onnx onnxruntime redteam reverse-engineering security-research systems-security wasm webassembly windows
